assumption_note: Higher industrial employment may indicate higher automation exposure.
Higher agricultural employment may indicate structural transformation pressure.
Service employment share cannot distinguish high-skill vs low-skill service jobs in World Bank data; positive direction is an assumption used only in EVI-robustness, not EVI-main.
Higher unemployment indicates weaker labour market absorption.
Higher youth unemployment indicates stronger youth labour market pressure.
Higher internet use indicates stronger digital readiness.
Higher mobile subscriptions indicate stronger digital connectivity.
Higher fixed broadband subscriptions indicate stronger digital infrastructure.
